data.content: Shipment complete. All changes merged to main via feat/foolery-c2ee-audit-ux branch (merge commit 9c9340b3). Key commits: 2d4b8fc3 (audit UX: remove tally, add combined chart, last-24h preset, per-step leaderboard), 67259f75 (queue screen: ancestor chain for queued children). Code pushed to origin/main. CI green — both CI and Coverage Badge workflows passed on head SHA 9c9340b3. Child b2b7 advanced to ready_for_shipment_review.
